name: com.duzi.bindery
description: WPF-style data binding for Unity 6 UI Toolkit. Source-generated bindable ViewModels from R3/UniRx ReactiveProperty fields, plus declarative UXML bindings for string formatting, multi-source values, and button commands - MVVM without the boilerplate.

samples.description: Slider, formatted label, multi-source label, and a ReactiveCommand button wired with Bindery. Requires R3.
